cases.coverage: HeartMuLa music generation with extended lyrics targeting 600000 ms through opt-in infinite mode

requests.text:
[Intro]

[Verse]
The sun creeps in across the floor
I hear the traffic outside the door
The coffee pot begins to hiss
It is another morning just like this

[Prechorus]
The world keeps spinning round and round
Feet are planted on the ground
I find my rhythm in the sound

[Chorus]
Every day the light returns
Every day the fire burns
We keep on walking down this street
Moving to the same steady beat
It is the ordinary magic that we meet

[Verse]
The hours tick deeply into noon
Chasing shadows, chasing the moon
Work is done and the lights go low
Watching the city start to glow

[Bridge]
It is not always easy, not always bright
Sometimes we wrestle with the night
But we make it to the morning light

[Chorus]
Every day the light returns
Every day the fire burns
We keep on walking down this street
Moving to the same steady beat

[Outro]
Just another day
Every single day

cases.coverage: ACE-Step turbo text2music with lyrics at 4096 + 50 characters and 600 second duration to exercise lyric truncation at the official maximum duration

requests.text: cinematic synth pop with clear vocals, wide drums, and a bright anthemic chorus
requests.lyrics:
[Intro]
A silver pulse is rising through the rain
The city hums beneath the window pane
[Verse]
We follow every spark across the wire
A choir of neon hearts becomes a fire
The bass is steady like a train at night
The melody keeps climbing into light
[Pre-Chorus]
Hold the line and let the rhythm breathe
Count the stars that gather underneath
[Chorus]
We are running through the thunder
We are singing over waves
Every echo pulls us under
Every heartbeat finds a place
[Bridge]
When the morning breaks the skyline open
Let the final note remain unbroken
[Intro]
